title: Jelly Lab
description: Pressure-based soft-body physics sandbox — squish, throw, and rain colorful jelly shapes.
concept: Jelly Lab is a real-time soft-body physics simulator using Verlet integration and pressure-volume preservation. Each shape is a network of spring-connected points that squish realistically on impact. You can grab any point to throw, shake the world, rain shapes from above, and export your scene.
features: 6 shape types: circle, square, star, triangle, pentagon, blob
Pressure-volume preservation for realistic squish on collision
Drag any point to grab & throw bodies
Rain mode drops 5 random jellies from above
PNG export and localStorage scene persistence

interaction.click: Click canvas to add a jelly; click+drag to grab and throw
interaction.touch: Tap to add; press and drag to throw
